data.title: Roundhouse Provisions Basecamp Complete wins "Meal Replacement Product of the Year" at 2025 Mindful Awards; a plant-based nutrition shake approved by Chuck Norris, renowned for convenience, taste, and balance.
data.description: Chuck Norris-endorsed plant-based nutrition shake hailed for its convenient, delicious, and balanced formula. Founded by the iconic actor, Roundhouse Provisions® has gained recognition for its exceptional qualities. The product is gaining popularity as a go-to option for health-conscious consumers. The news was announced on July 18, 2025, in Houston.

data.title: MBAK Energy Solutions showcases expansion at Battery Show Asia with comprehensive battery industry approach.
data.description: In a recent announcement made on July 18, 2025, MBAK, now operating under a new name, is broadening its operations in Seoul, South Korea; Shenzhen, China; and Wilmington, North Carolina. The company is extending its focus within the battery sector to incorporate a holistic strategy. This involves involvement in the complete process of battery production from design to development, emphasizing a more comprehensive approach.
South Korea: Yoon Ho-joong, candidate for Minister of the Interior and Safety, has his confirmation report adopted through bipartisan agreement

data.title: Thumzup Media, backed by Donald Trump Jr., approves $250M for Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, SOL, Dogecoin. Trend of Trump-aligned businesses adopting crypto.
data.description: Thumzup Media Corporation, traded as TZUP on NASDAQ and supported by Donald Trump Jr., has been granted approval by its board to invest up to $250 million in cryptocurrencies. The company can now diversify its holdings to include Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Solana (SOL), Ripple (XRP), Dogecoin (DOGE), Litecoin (LTC), and USDC (USDC). This shift in investment strategy is in line with a trend where Trump-associated firms are increasingly adopting digital assets as part of their treasury plans. CEO Robert Steele attributed the decision to evolving financial landscapes.
Northland Capital Increases CoreWeave Price Target to $165 From $85

data.title: Express Wash Concepts opens the 10th Clean Express Auto Wash in Metro Detroit on July 18, offering free signature washes till July 27 at 25100 Harper Ave. in St. Clair Shores.
data.description: Express Wash Concepts (EWC) has revealed the opening of its tenth Detroit metro Clean Express Auto Wash at 25100 Harper Ave. in St. Clair Shores. To celebrate, they are offering free Signature Washes from July 18 to 27. This marks a significant milestone for EWC in expanding their presence in the Detroit area. This initiative aims to attract customers with the promise of quality and convenience. This location is strategically situated to cater to a wide customer base, serving residents in the surrounding communities.

data.title: Adecoagro S.A. starts tender offer for all 2027 notes, including outstanding 6.000% Notes due 2027.
data.description: Luxembourg, July 18, 2025 - Adecoagro S.A. ("Adecoagro" or the "Company")(NYSE: "AGRO") has officially launched a cash tender offer, named the "Tender Offer," for all of its existing 6.000% Notes scheduled to mature in 2027, identified as the "Notes." The 144A CUSIP / ISIN code for the Notes is 00676L AA4. This initiative aims to acquire any and all outstanding Notes from investors. The Company is currently accepting offers for the designated Notes, which carry a 6.000% interest rate and will mature in 2027. Shareholders and interested parties are encouraged to participate in this opportunity provided by Adecoagro S.A.

data.title: Housing regulator allows lenders to use FICO or VantageScore for mortgages. Good news for borrowers?
data.description: A major housing finance regulator has revealed that Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac will now permit lenders to utilize either the traditional FICO score or its competitor, VantageScore. This decision opens up new opportunities for lenders and borrowers, potentially impacting a significant segment of the housing market.

data.title: Is the US more risky than Emerging Markets? Despite the stock market rebound, Trump tariffs and volatile dollar have caused concern among investors.
data.description: The U.S. stock market has seen an impressive recovery recently. However, the impact of the Trump tariffs, fluctuating dollar, and unstable bond market has started to unsettle global investment strategy. Investors are becoming cautious due to this uncertain climate, with important indices showing significant fluctuations.

data.title: Five Point Holdings, LLC to announce Q2 2025 financial results on July 24, 2025 at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Conference call details:  https://ir.fivepoint.com, (877) 451-6152.
data.description: Irvine, California-based Five Point Holdings, LLC, a company specializing in developing large mixed-use planned communities in California, is set to conduct a conference call to review its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. The call is scheduled for Thursday, July 24th, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Those interested can access a live Internet audio webcast of the call on Five Point's website at https://ir.fivepoint.com. Additionally, participants can join the call by dialing (877) 451-6152 for domestic access.

data.title: LeadStory secures $2.75M funding, introduces advanced AI video search. Focus on accurate news responses amid user AI concerns.
data.description: In response to increasing user worries about AI inaccuracies and outdated information, LeadStory ASK now provides the most accurate responses to user queries through the use of high-quality broadcast news clips. The platform, based in New York, is revolutionizing the news industry by offering on-demand personalized news streaming services. This innovative approach is particularly crucial given the date of July 18, 2025.

data.title: KuCoin introduces xStocks, providing access to global tokenized equities for extensive crypto user base. #Crypto #KuCoin #xStocks
data.description: In Victoria, Seychelles on July 18, 2025, KuCoin, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange, revealed the listing of xStocks and its membership in the xStocks alliance. xStocks are tokenized stocks developed by Backed, a Swiss company. This development signifies a noteworthy milestone in the cryptocurrency market landscape.
U.S. Two-Year Treasury Yield Drops Again, Closing 5.2 Basis Points Lower at 3.865%
US Treasury 10-Year Yields Continue Decline, Dropping 3.9 Basis Points to 4.426%

data.title: AI dating platform challenges elite human matchmakers as A24's Materialists hits PVOD on July 22, 2025.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Basking Ridge, New Jersey, the A24 movie Materialists will be released on premium video-on-demand (PVOD) services on July 22. The film is sparking discussions about high-stakes, exclusive matchmaking. Portraying a romanticized view of human connections, the movie delves into the world of elite matchmaking.

data.title: BullFrog AI hosting live investor webinar on July 23 at 4:15 p.m. ET. Learn about drug development using AI and machine learning in pharmaceuticals and biologics.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, BullFrog AI Holdings, Inc. announced an upcoming webinar for investors on July 23, 2025, at 4:15 p.m. ET. BullFrog AI, listed on NASDAQ as BFRG and BFRGW, is a technology-driven company specializing in drug development. Using artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning, the company aims to enhance the development of pharmaceuticals and biologics.

data.title: Mary Alice Dorrance Malone Jr. appointed to Campbell's Board of Directors at 42. Founder of luxury brand Malone Souliers.
data.description: In Camden, New Jersey, Campbell's Company (NASDAQ: CPB) disclosed the addition of Mary Alice Dorrance Malone Jr., aged 42, to its Board of Directors. Malone, the Founder and Chief Brand Director of Malone Souliers, a luxury fashion brand, brings a distinctive mix of creative, analytical, and entrepreneurial expertise to the board. Keith R. McLoughlin, the Chair of the Board, expressed satisfaction in Malone's appointment.

data.title: MarineMax Inc. (NYSE: HZO) to release Q3 fiscal 2025 results on July 24, 2025. Conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET. CEO Brett McGill and EVP Mike McLamb to host.
data.description: MarineMax, Inc., the leading recreational boat and yacht retailer globally, alongside being a marina operator and superyacht services company, is set to disclose its financial outcomes for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025 before the commencement of the New York Stock Exchange on Thursday, July 24, 2025. Following this, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day, there will be a conference call organized by the company, with Brett McGill, the Chief Executive Officer and President, and Mike McLamb, the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, as the hosts. MarineMax, Inc. is traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol HZO.

data.title: lululemon opens first store in Italy on July 19, 2025, in Milan's shopping district, introducing athletic apparel to market.
data.description: lululemon (NASDAQ:LULU) is expanding globally by opening its first store in Italy, set to launch on Saturday, July 19, 2025, in Milan’s renowned shopping area. The new store, situated at Vittorio Emanuele II 24/28, aims to introduce Italian customers to lululemon’s advanced athletic clothing and accessories. This move aligns with the brand’s goal of promoting wellness and potential.
